MATTER ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, JUNE 14, 2010. J. SCOTT MCKAY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, ZOOSKI VENTURES, RICK W. GRADY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT J. GOLDSMIT ASSOCIATES, INC.. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED; DEFENDANT J. GOLDSCHMIDT ASSOCIATES, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET TWO) IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS, EXCEPT THOSE ASSERTING THE WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE, ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO THE WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE SHALL BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION OTHERWISE MAY BE ADEQUATE. WHILE THE PREVIOUS RULING DID NOT ADDRESS THE SCOPE OF 'REFER OR RELATE TO,' BY THAT RULING THE COURT DID NOT CONTEMPLATE THE SCOPE SUGGESTED BY DEFENDANT. FURTHER VERIFICATION BY JUNE 21, 2010. COMMISSIONER EVERETT HEWLETT, NOT REPORTED (612).

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents (Set Two) And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calendar for Monday, June 14, 2010. J. Scott McKay appearing for Plaintiff, Zooski Ventures, Rick W. Grady appearing for defendant J. Goldsmit Associates, INC.. Tentative ruling adopted as modified; DEFENDANT J. GOLDSCHMIDT ASSOCIATES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents (Set Two) is granted in part and denied. The motion is granted as Plaintiff's objections, except those asserting the work product privilege, are overruled and ordered stricken. Any documents withheld pursuant to the work product privilege shall be identified with particularity. The court finds that the responses and production otherwise may be adequate. While the previous ruling did not address the scope of 'refer or relate to,' by that ruling the court did not contemplate the scope suggested by Defendant. Further verification by June 21, 2010.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, And Document Requests
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
Plaintiff Zooski Ventures, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Document Requests is granted. As to all responses which purportedly reserve the right to amend or supplement the response, that purported reservation is ordered stricken.

As to Interrogatory Number 3 and Document Request No. 3, Defendant's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The interrogatory and document request seek responses which identify a number and date of issuance of a document and a document, not a response which goes to Defendant's belief as to whether a written certificate or stamp is required. Defendant is ordered to respond further.

As to Document Requests 4, 5, and 6, Defendant's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond further as to to Zooski Ventures, Inc. and all entities named in the Fictitious Name Statement.

Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied.
COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
